ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quarantine_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarantine facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact purposes */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., hotel, hospital) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the facility information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the region information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_counts" (
  "patient_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient count record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where patients are quarantined */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the facility */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "patient_count" INTEGER /* Number of patients in the facility during the specified period */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the patient count */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the patient count */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_counts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES quarantine_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_counts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_counts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_counts_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, data entry, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the report is about */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the report is about */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES quarantine_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource on which the action was performed (e.g., patient_counts, reports) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
